name: OpenBindings Software Descriptor
description: Base contract for software participating in the OpenBindings ecosystem. Defines the getInfo operation for self-identification. Implementations may return additional fields beyond the minimum.

SoftwareInfo.description: Identity and metadata for a piece of software. Implementations may include additional fields.

description.description: Brief description of what this software does.

homepage.description: URL to documentation or project page.

getInfo.description: Return identity and metadata about this software.
